title: ChpApprovalGrant
description: chp-approval-grant-v1 (chp-v0.2.md section 19, proposal 0037): an approver's ed25519-signed grant authorizing a specific invocation (bound to invocation_id + payload_commitment) to resume past an approval_required gate and execute exactly once. Verified offline like a mandate.

approval_id.description: Opaque id of this approval decision.

invocation_id.description: The exact invocation this grant authorizes.

decision.description: Only a granted decision authorizes a resume.

valid_until.description: Expiry; a resume after this is rejected.

payload_commitment.description: sha256(chp-stable-v1(payload)) of the approved request payload — binds the payload so a resume cannot swap it.
